title: Details Emerge in Kyle Busch Death Investigation
summary: New details are released regarding the death of NASCAR driver Kyle Busch during a visit to Charlotte. Investigation ongoing.
charlotte_impact: The death of a prominent NASCAR driver raises questions about safety and security in the Charlotte area.

title: Wegmans Announces Opening Date for Charlotte Store
summary: Wegmans grocery store chain reveals the opening date for its first store in the Charlotte, NC market, expanding options for consumers.
charlotte_impact: New grocery store provides more options for consumers and boosts the local economy.

title: Virginia Baseball Heads to Charlotte for ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia baseball team is the No. 8 seed in the ACC tournament in Charlotte, facing NC State or Duke.
charlotte_impact: The ACC tournament brings regional sports competition and tourism to Charlotte.

title: Sports on TV: ACC Tournament in Charlotte
summary: TV schedule includes the Atlantic Coast Tournament: Duke vs. NC State, First Round, Charlotte, N.C.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the sports events happening in Charlotte and broadcasted on TV.

title: NC NAACP Defends President on Interim Mayor Stance
summary: North Carolina NAACP defends Corine Mack after she questioned a White person serving as Charlotte's interim mayor.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about race and representation in local politics.

title: Retirement Planning Film Features Charlotte Expert
summary: Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions featured in 'Retirement Everest,' a film examining retirement decumulation risks.
charlotte_impact: Highlights local expertise in retirement planning and financial security.

title: Shelby Officer Fired; NC SBI Investigates Use of Force
summary: A Shelby officer was fired, and the NC SBI is investigating a use-of-force incident at the request of local authorities.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police accountability and the use of force.

title: Weekend Weather: Rain to Sunshine
summary: Scattered downpours expected today, but Sunday will improve with sunshine and temperatures near 76 degrees.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast for the weekend, impacting outdoor activities.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks associated with construction and the importance of contracts.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer was not identified.
charlotte_impact: Serious allegations of police misconduct and excessive force.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife files a wrongful death lawsuit related to a plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport that killed 7.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the legal aftermath of a tragic aviation accident.

title: Car Break-ins Target Clover Neighborhood
summary: Thieves target Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles and stealing at least one gun.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing crime issues and public safety concerns.

title: Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: A Salisbury teacher turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Serious allegations of sexual misconduct involving a teacher and a student.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awards Charlotte Douglas Airport $46.9M to expand the airport apron, improving infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Airport expansion will improve capacity and efficiency, benefiting travelers and the local economy.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run
summary: Frank Leon Dent died months after a hit-and-run in north Charlotte. Police seek information on the driver.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the need for justice.
